narrative_suggested: The image suggests a clandestine exchange of money, implying corruption or a backroom deal.
loaded_visual_elements: man hiding money bag behind his back
description: Two silhouetted figures in suits are depicted. One figure, facing away from the viewer, is shown hiding a red bag with a dollar sign behind their back, while extending a hand towards the other figure. The second figure, facing the viewer, is reaching out to shake hands.
